title: X's Enhanced Experience
description: With this modpack, I’ve aimed to enhance Minecraft’s visual experience based on my own vision of what makes the game look its best. One of many of its kind, but I wanted to share my own vision.
body:
# **X's enhanced experience**


![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/667784ba1e0241fba04b28a8cb8bebc3b0c0bc42_0.webp)

**A pack focused on enhancing Minecraft's visuals and gameplay while staying true to its essence**

**Note: The pack can have a significant impact on performance, so feel free to change the settings as you see fit.**

_The additions are mostly visual and do not affect gameplay._
